an10.168:1.0.1: "Bhikkhus, I will teach you the noblepaccorohaŠĻáńęfestival. Listen ‚Ä¶.
an10.168:1.0.2: "And what, bhikkhus, is the noblepaccorohaŠĻáńęfestival?(1) Here, the noble disciple reflects thus: ‚ÄėThe result of the destruction of life is bad both in this present life and in future lives.‚Äô Having reflected thus, he abandons the destruction of life; he descends from the destruction of life.
an10.168:1.0.3: (2) ‚ÄėThe result of taking what is not given ‚Ä¶
an10.168:1.0.11: (10) ‚Ä¶ wrong view is bad both in this present life and in future lives.‚Äô Having reflected thus, he abandons wrong view; he descends from wrong view. This is called the noblepaccorohaŠĻáńęfestival."
